title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 4th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Worst is over; hold 1-1.5 yr, even Rs 1000 buyers will profit
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said the worst is over for Tejas, it is only a matter of time. Even before BSNL money arrived, one deal drove the stock up 60-70% off its low, showing how important that deal was. The stock will do extremely well over the long term; held another one to one-and-a-half years, even those who bought at Rs 1000 will see profits.
Asked about investing in CDSL now, Kutumba Rao said it is not a great choice. He cautioned to follow technicals carefully given the weak market.

recommendations.note: Good results but weak market drags everything; be careful, follow technicals
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said Jeena Sikho keeps announcing good results, no doubt about that, but in a weak market any stock falls. He advised being careful and following technicals carefully rather than buying now.
